title: Pawel Koziol
text: Home * People * Pawel Koziol Pawel Koziol [1] Pawel Koziol , an amateur chess programmer from Poland. Author of Hopeless (open-source, written in Delphi , characterized by very unbalanced playing style) and CCCP (free but closed source, derived from TSCP , playing also chess variant called knightmate ). Pawel Koziol has contributed to the Chess Programming Wiki mainly to the pages on evaluation . He is co-author ofthe CPW-engine and is author of Glass [2] , and the more recent open source engine Rodent [3] .
